task_completion.description: The flipchart includes a page titled 'Fire Drill Route' or 'Evacuation Plan'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text on the ActivInspire canvas clearly reading 'Fire Drill Route' or 'Evacuation Plan'.

task_completion.description: A large rectangle representing the room layout is drawn.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A large rectangle shape on the canvas that acts as the boundary or walls of the classroom.

task_completion.description: A 'Teacher Desk' is included and labeled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A shape (e.g., a smaller rectangle) inside the room layout with the text 'Teacher Desk' (or 'Teacher' and 'Desk') written on or next to it.

task_completion.description: At least four 'Student Tables' are included in the room.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least four distinct shapes (such as rectangles, squares, or circles) placed inside the room layout representing student tables.

task_completion.description: The 'Door' or 'Exit' is marked and labeled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A shape, gap, or marker on the boundary of the room layout labeled with the text 'Door' or 'Exit'.

task_completion.description: At least three arrows indicate the evacuation path from the tables to the exit.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three or more arrow shapes or drawn lines with arrowheads pointing from the vicinity of the student tables towards the marked door/exit.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog showing the filename 'fire_evacuation_plan.flipchart' or the ActivInspire window title bar displaying this filename.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire application GUI to create the map.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire interface (toolbars, canvas, menus) is visible in the screenshots. The agent is not using a terminal script or text editor to generate the file.

integrity.description: The agent manually placed shapes, text, and arrows on the canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: Tool selections (shape tool, text tool, connector/arrow tool) and object manipulation handles are visible during the creation process.

integrity.description: The file was saved using the application's save functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'Save' or 'Save As' dialog box from ActivInspire is visible, navigating to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a flipchart in ActivInspire saved as 'fire_evacuation_plan.flipchart'. The canvas must contain specific text labels (either 'Fire Drill Route' or 'Evacuation Plan', 'Teacher Desk', and 'Door' or 'Exit'). It must contain a minimum of 6 shapes (1 large room rectangle, 1 teacher desk, and at least 4 student tables) and at least 3 arrows showing the path from the tables to the exit.
